base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of battle_bg_forest — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1986 dragon quest. Forest battle backdrop — trees framing encounter. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Forest battle backdrop — trees framing encounter; used on forest tiles
